## Rate limits
Requests are limited per plan on two axes: a per-minute burst limit and a monthly quota.

| Plan | Per minute | Monthly quota |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Free | 60 | 1,000 |
| Pro | 120 | 10,000 |
| Business | 300 | 100,000 |
| Agency | 600 | 500,000 |
